texto: Nothing will ruin the country if the people themselves will undertake its safety
autor: and nothing can save it if they leave that safety in any hands but their own.
explicacao: Citação de and nothing can save it if they leave that safety in any hands but their own. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Nothing will ruin the country if the people themselves will undertake its safety” articula reflexao, daniel-webster, nothing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
